endpoints.name: Get the view of corporate actions under a particular owner

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: The number of entries to skip from the beginning of the collection

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: The number of entries to return from the beginning of the collection

parameters.name: AssetTypes
parameters.description: Asset type filter for events.

children.name: CertificateBonus
children.description: Mirrors the price movement of the underlying only if and when the underlying price exceeds the defined barrier. If the certificate expires below the barrier, it offers partial protection/return of investment.

children.name: CertificateCappedCapitalProtected
children.description: Guarantees a capped percentage increase of the underlying asset's value above the issue price at expiry/maturity. Max loss is the amount invested multiplied by the CapitalProtection percentage.

children.name: CertificateDiscount
children.description: Yields a capped return if the underlying asset's value is above the specified cap level at expiry. If the underlying's value is below the strike at expiry, the investor received the underlying or equivalent value. Offers direct exposure in underlying at a lower price (discount) with a capped potential profit and limited loss.

children.name: CertificateTracker
children.description: A certificate that mirrors the price movement of the underlying instrument. Often used to trade movements in indicies. Movements can be a fixed ratio of the underlying and can be inverted for bearish/short speculation. Risk is equivalent to owning the underlying.

children.name: CertificateUncappedCapitalProtection
children.description: Guarantees a percentage increase of the underlying asset's value above the issue price at expiry/maturity. Max loss is the amount invested multiplied by the CapitalProtection percentage.

children.name: CertificateUncappedOutperformance
children.description: Provides leveraged returns when the underlying price exceeds the threshold strike price. The amount leverage is defined by the Participation %. When the underlying is below the strike price, the certificate mirrors the underlying price 1:1.

children.name: CfdOnCompanyWarrant
children.description: Cfd on unlisted warrant issued by a corporation.

children.name: CompanyWarrant
children.description: Unlisted warrant issued by a corporation, often physically settled.

parameters.name: CorporateActionTypes
parameters.description: Corporate action type filter for events.

children.name: Mandatory
children.description: Mandatory event: Event where no response is required and action is applied automatically.

children.name: Voluntary
children.description: Voluntary event: Event where a response is required. If no response is received before the reply deadline, the option marked as Default will be applied.

parameters.name: ElectionStatuses
parameters.description: Election status filter for events.

parameters.name: EventStates
parameters.description: Filter collection based on event state. Note that some events are only returned if IncludeLapsedEvents is set to true.

parameters.name: EventStatus
parameters.description: Event status filter.

parameters.name: EventTypes
parameters.description: Event type filter. Use event type codes to filter.

parameters.name: FromDeadlineDate
parameters.description: Events on or after specified deadline date.

parameters.name: FromExDate
parameters.description: Events on or after specified ex date.

parameters.name: FromPayDate
parameters.description: Events on or after specified pay date.

parameters.name: FromRecordDate
parameters.description: Events on or after specified record date.

parameters.name: IncludeLapsedEvents
parameters.description: If true, the returned collection will include otherwise excluded events. These events have EventStatus of Past and an EventState of Preliminary, Cancelled, or Confirmed. These events are excluded by default due their low importance and excessive volumes.

parameters.name: Keywords
parameters.description: Looks for keywords in instrument description, ISIN code, and instrument symbol.

parameters.name: OwnerKey
parameters.description: Unique key identifying the owner. This is the clientKey of the owner under which corporate actions will be queried. Default: Logged-in user's client.

parameters.name: SortColumn
parameters.description: Specify a column to sort on. Default sort will be provided on Date.

children.name: AffectedAccounts
children.description: Sort by number of accounts affected

children.name: EligibleHoldings
children.description: Sort by total amount in holdings

parameters.name: SortType
parameters.description: Specify ascending or descending sort. Default sort type will be Descending.

parameters.name: ToDeadlineDate
parameters.description: Events on or before specified deadline date.

parameters.name: ToExDate
parameters.description: Events on or before specified ex date.

parameters.name: ToPayDate
parameters.description: Events on or before specified pay date.

parameters.name: ToRecordDate
parameters.description: Events on or before specified record date.

Values.Description: The issuer only allows a single option to be selected per designated holding.
Values.Name: No Split Election

Values.Description: Change from bearer into registered form.
Values.Name: Bearer to Registered

Values.Description: This is a change in the terms and conditions of the bond.
Values.Name: Change in Terms

Values.Description: Payment of a dividend, less the amounts already paid through interim dividends.
Values.Name: Final

EventType.Description: Distribution of cash to shareholders, in proportion to their equity holding. Ordinary dividends are recurring and regular. Shareholder must take cash and may be offered a choice of currency.
EventType.Name: Cash Dividend

Data.Narrative: ADTXRights issue trading period of rights: ______________   terms: you may apply for _____ new share for every ______ rights held at _________ per share.Client must ensure that they instruct in the multiple/s advised in the notification.Failure to comply will result in the rejection of instruction/s and client/s will not be notified of the rejection.Option 1: exercise (receive shares) option 2: oversubscribe (please state the number of additional shares you wish to oversubscribe for).Option 3: lapse (default) should the client wish to oversubscribe, kindly ensure to exercise full quantity of rights.Oversubscription may be subject to scaleback based at the account level.For clients who elect to exercise and oversubscribe, please ensure your account is funded on the same day of instructions submission; failure to do so will result in your instruction being rejected.Total subscription cost/s including oversubscription will be debited on the next business day after the instruction deadline date.A potential future resultant entitlement will be booked to a dummy security and may be subject to a proration factor being applied where oversubscription has been elected.Note that any reduction or change in this position may be a result of this factor.The final resultant entitlement will be booked on the market identifier upon receipt from agent.In the case where scaleback of subscription/oversubscription occurs, cost will be refunded without interest as soon as practical upon receipt from the agent.We will attempt to sell any tradeable rights position left uninstructed or instructed to lapse on the last rights trading date if the value of the client position is worth more than eur 30 or equivalent to the currency of the security.For non tradeable rights, rights not exercised will be lapsed worthless.We hereby informs the client that, according to the laws of the country of its incorporation or the laws of the country of residence of its customers and the laws applicable to an issuer of securities which are subject to corporate actions, the client, will decide to participate or not to such corporate actions upon its sole and exclusive discretion and judgment.The client will bear any detrimental consequence arising out of or connected to such instruction.For the avoidance of doubt, any information in relation to the corporate actions sent to the client may have been obtained from sources which are not under the bank's control and accordingly, the bank shall not be held responsible for the truth and the accuracy of this information.Please refer to the prospectus of the event for any further details.ADTXRights issue trading period of rights: ______________   terms: you may apply for _____ new share for every ______ rights held at _________ per share.Client must ensure that they instruct in the multiple/s advised in the notification.Failure to comply will result in the rejection of instruction/s and client/s will not be notified of the rejection.Option 1: exercise (receive shares) option 2: oversubscribe (please state the number of additional shares you wish to oversubscribe for).Option 3: lapse (default) should the client wish to oversubscribe, kindly ensure to exercise full quantity of rights.Oversubscription may be subject to scaleback based at the account level.For clients who elect to exercise and oversubscribe, please ensure your account is funded on the same day of instructions submission; failure to do so will result in your instruction being rejected.Total subscription cost/s including oversubscription will be debited on the next business day after the instruction deadline date.A potential future resultant entitlement will be booked to a dummy security and may be subject to a proration factor being applied where oversubscription has been elected.Note that any reduction or change in this position may be a result of this factor.The final resultant entitlement will be booked on the market identifier upon receipt from agent.In the case where scaleback of subscription/oversubscription occurs, cost will be refunded without interest as soon as practical upon receipt from the agent.We will attempt to sell any tradeable rights position left uninstructed or instructed to lapse on the last rights trading date if the value of the client position is worth more than eur 30 or equivalent to the currency of the security.For non tradeable rights, rights not exercised will be lapsed worthless.We hereby informs the client that, according to the laws of the country of its incorporation or the laws of the country of residence of its customers and the laws applicable to an issuer of securities which are subject to corporate actions, the client, will decide to participate Values.Description: All values (including minimum and maximum prices) are divisible by the bid interval.
Values.Name: Divisible

Values.Description: The holder of the security has to certify his domicile.
Values.Name: Country of Domicile
